If strategy was enough,
you would already be there.

What becomes possible

This is what your life and business
look like on the other side.

You set your fees at the level you've been circling for months and fully own every cent. No resentment, no apology. You ask for the number that matches what you actually want, and people say yes.

You stop talking yourself out of the audacious opportunities: the stages, the features, the pitches that used to feel too big. You go after them and the results that follow feel like stepping into a new reality.

You only work with clients who light you up. The second-guessing is gone. The right people find you, they show up ready, and they pay without hesitation.

The version of you that only showed up on your best days? That's who you are now. Every day. No self-sabotage, no waiting to feel ready. You go after what you want, exactly how you want it. And you get it, fast.

You already know it's not about working harder.

You know you don't lack the strategy. You have more strategies than you can count sitting in your Google Drive right now, quietly collecting digital dust.

The gap between where you are and where you want to be is not about your knowledge or your systems. It's an identity gap.

Your subconscious hasn't caught up to the vision you consciously hold in your mind.

Until it does, you can push as hard as you want - the ceiling is going to stay exactly where it is.

The Desire Coding closes that gap, directly and permanently.

What it is

Your desires, coded directly
into who you are.

We start with a 90-minute private consultation. I ask the questions nobody else asks and listen for what's beneath what you're saying.

Having all the information, I build a complete, fully bespoke suite of subconscious and conscious reprogramming audios, aimed at your specific desires.

You don't pick from a library. You don't get a template with your name dropped in.

Every audio is built around you - your desires, your history, your specific situation, and exactly where you are in your business right now.

This is the most strategic reprogramming work you can imagine, and it will make your brain your most powerful ally in making your vision your reality.

Inside your private experience
01

90-Minute Private Deep Dive

In 90 minutes, we go deep into all the reasons why you don't have what you want just yet. It has nothing to do with your actions and everything to do with what you believe and who you are right now.

That's where the real gap lives.
Luckily, once we find it, I know precisely how to close it.

02

Subconscious Reprogramming Audio

Built directly from what we uncovered, this audio uses the most suitable subconscious reprogramming techniques to shift what's been keeping you from your desires at the core level.

Once it does, your newly installed, incredibly empowering beliefs will have you going after what you want in a way you never have before.

03

On-Demand Energy Boost Audio

When you need to show up at your absolute best, this audio gets you there fast. Before a sales call, a pitch, a stage, a bold move, it shifts your state in minutes.

Fully charged, completely grounded, and ready to do the very thing you want to do.

04

Laser-Focused Affirmations Audio

Not all affirmations are equal and most don't work because your mind rejects what it doesn't believe yet.

As a subconscious reprogramming ninja, I create a laser-focused, fully personalized affirmations audio using language that your conscious and subconscious mind will accept and act upon without hesitation.

05

Bespoke Subliminal Audio

This is the audio that does the heavy lifting for you as you work, rest, and live your life.

Built entirely around your specific desires, it creates deep shifts in your subconscious, programming it for success without you having to lift a finger.

06

5 Days of Private Support

From the day your audios land in your vault, you have direct access to me for 5 full days so that I can guide you on exactly how to use each audio to create the specific results you want.

The most advanced reprogramming, built for you alone

Three Fully Bespoke Power Audios

These are fully produced songs, in your favorite music genre, that program your conscious and subconscious mind for exactly what you want.

They name that specific client, that exact number, that exact life — things only you would recognize, because they were written for you specifically.

We turn them into a playlist that upgrades your identity with each play. Reaching your desired goal stops being hard work and becomes the obvious next step.

Audio One

The Desire

Your exact VISION. That specific number, that specific client, that specific life, coded into a song so that your mind can go after it, fast.

Audio Two

The Identity

The version of you that already has what you want. The one who charges more, shows up powerful AF, and is the obvious choice. Not some day. NOW.

Audio Three

The Shift

Releasing the specific pattern that's been keeping the ceiling in place. Once your brain absorbs it through a song, there will be nothing left in the way.

Every audio is written for ONE PERSON only.
YOU.

I'm Kasia.
The Identity Magician.

And what that means is that I know exactly how to get into the subconscious and rewire what's running your business on autopilot, whether you like it or not.

I grew up in communist Poland where $14 a month was reality. A veterinarian who built multiple successful businesses with zero business background, and worked with brands like Chanel, Nespresso, or MINI.

I know what it means to become someone your past self couldn't have imagined.

In my world, we don't fake confidence or push through fear but change who you are at the identity level. Then the clients, the money, the ease, all of it follows naturally. Every single time.

The Desire Coding is the deeply personal, most direct version of that work. It is your most empowered identity, delivered in sound.

FAQ

Your questions, answered.

How long does it take to receive my audios? +

Your complete audio suite is delivered latest 10 work days from your deep-dive consultation, and usually within one week.

What if my issue is more personal than business? +

That is very common. Most of the time what's actually blocking your results in business is very personal and refers to body image, relationships, self-worth, fear of being seen, and more. We go wherever the real block lives and take care of it, at the root. Win-win for your business AND life!

Is this offer for everyone, regardless of gender? +

Absolutely! The Desire Coding is for anyone who is ready to grow, reach their next level, make more money, and powerfully go after their desires.

I have more questions. +

Great! Please DM me on Instagram @theidentitymagician and I'll be happy to answer.
